programme.title: The King of Queens: Bun Dummy
programme.desc: Doug tries to figure out how to tell Carrie that he hates her new hairstyle.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Patrons Ain't
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie donate $500 to the school library and get their names put on a plaque.

programme.title: Movie: The Cheating Pact
programme.desc: Three high school students face pressure to get into good colleges so they ask a smart girl to take a test for them. After she gets a low score on the test, she ends of dead and the three other students are suspects where one of them learns she is framed.

programme.title: Movie: Pregnant and Deadly
programme.desc: After a devastating car accident, a couple is haunted by the driver of the other vehicle who lost her unborn child.

programme.title: Movie: My Wife's Secret Life
programme.desc: A woman's life is turned upside down when a former lover begins stalking her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services

programme.desc: In 1996, one person was killed and hundreds were injured when a bomb went off at the Atlanta Olympics. Five more bombs would be detonated, and the FBI, ATF and GBI realize they are looking for a serial bomber.

programme.desc: In 1999, a murdered woman and her address book are discovered to have been soaked in a barrel for over 30 years. Detectives must use spectral imaging to recover information for a break in the case.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Left For Dead
programme.desc: Armed with DNA and a license plate from a particularly violent rape case, a detective thinks he has an easy case to crack. But neither provides a match. The case goes cold until the ground-breaking ‘Combined DNA Index System’ finds a hit years later.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: The Green River Killer
programme.desc: In 1982 the first of over 50 victims of America's most prolific serial killer were discovered. After being at large for two decades, 'forensic microscopy' was used to link the women to the killer.

programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Beating the Big Freeze
programme.desc: Parker gets a little help from his parents while Rick struggles to hit 1,000 ounces before the big freeze. Later, shocking news forces Tony to make a tough decision about his season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Parker's Big Risk

programme.title: Gold Rush: 15 Million Dollar Season
programme.desc: Last year was the biggest haul ever for the miners, despite the extreme hardships and challenges Parker, Tony and Rick faced. Experience all the highs and lows from the epic 2018 season which could be last time all three men mine in the Klondike.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Crisis in the Klondike
programme.desc: A crisis in the Klondike forces Parker, Rick and Tony to take massive gambles to strike it rich and hunt for gold on new grounds. The setback hits just as the price of gold spikes, sparking a new gold rush to the area.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Best and the Worst

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: An epic Clash of Titans grips the gold mining fleet as Shawn constructs the largest washplant in Nome and Ken's mining monster roars to life. Vern prospects using his new innovations. Ripping currents threaten the Kellys.

programme.desc: The Championship Round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour, stage two, Conroe.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Maggot Farmer
programme.desc: Mike travels to Congress, Arizona, to try his hand at moving a giant cactus before a storm comes in. Then Mike heads to Idaho where he visits a special kind of farm, one that raises maggots.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Egg Farm
programme.desc: Mike visits a Chicken Farm to see how eggs make it to the store. There, he finds out that 1.4 million chickens equal a lot of poo, which he gets the chance to clean. Later, Mike learns how dirty dirt becomes clean dirt as he sterilizes soil in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Locomotive Builder
programme.desc: Mike heads to MotivePower in Boise, Idaho to build and restore locomotives for his 200th dirty job.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Aerial Tram Greaser
programme.desc: Mike travels to Palm Springs to help maintain and repair the tram 8,500 feet above ground.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bone Black
programme.desc: Mike heads to Michigan where he gets dirty in the Bone Black plant. He then meets with twin sisters who are huge fans of the show.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Greenland Shark Quest
programme.desc: Mike Rowe heads to Greenland to learn about one of the more obscure sharks.

programme.desc: Josh journeys to Mongolia's 'forbidden zone' to find Genghis Khan's tomb.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: It's Just Money

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Gown Worth the Trip
programme.desc: With Alaska coming up short on dress options, Liz has flown 4,000 miles and must find something. Norwegian Amanda has exhausted all options in Europe, with high hopes for the salon. After losing 18 pounds, Danielle worries her gown won't show her curves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: When in Doubt, Customize
programme.desc: Host Courtney Cason only wants a Mark Zunino gown, and she gets a huge surprise at Kleinfeld. Zabrina looks for an extravagant ball gown for her Near Year's Eve wedding, and Cheryl is nervous to try on her custom dress because she has never seen it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dazed and Gown-fused
programme.desc: Bride Nicole comes in with a very specific style of dress in mind, but discovers it may not suit her. Indecisive Katy has already tried on 50 gowns elsewhere and still doesn't know what she wants. Cy can't choose between two perfect dresses.

programme.desc: Jane and Lisa share the news about the exhumation with a group of Hicks Babies that have questioned whether Dr. Hicks was in fact their biological father. Sallie faces the reality of exhuming her father. The exhumation begins.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: 50 Is the New 35
programme.desc: Theresa turns 50 and enters a weightlifting competition. A woman who claims her brother was murdered by NFL player Aaron Hernandez visits Long Island. Theresa confides in a friend that she and Larry are going through a rough patch.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Freezing Theresa
programme.desc: 'Shark Tank' shark Barbara Corcoran gets a reading with Theresa. At a fundraiser, Theresa channels an accident victim for the distraught police officer who couldn't save him. Theresa reads a man while she's inside a cryogenic freezing chamber.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm Not the Size of a Hanger!
programme.desc: Southern bride Danielle gets some help from her girlfriends in the quest to find the perfect glamorous gown. Jen is having a beer-themed wedding, but wants her dress to be more traditional. Katie worries her large assets won't fit in her wedding gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Won the Battle Against My Twin!
programme.desc: Bride Margo struggles to get her twin sister's approval of the dresses she tries on. Brenda needs all four of her sisters to agree with her dress choice. Amy is trying on her super sexy gown, but worries her twin sister will think it's too revealing.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What Does Martha Think?
programme.desc: The wedding guru herself, Martha Stewart, visits Kleinfeld. She's helping bride Bailey decide if she truly chose her perfect dress. Meanwhile, bride Jessica is so indecisive she may not find a gown, and Crystal wants impossible alterations.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Sasha Dress
programme.desc: 'High School Musical' star Corbin Bleu joins his fiancée, Sasha, to find her dream dress. Bride Katie wants a classic ball gown, but her fiancé would like something sexier.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is Your Day
programme.desc: War veteran and bride-to-be Alicia has served in both Iraq and Afghanistan. Now, it's Randy's turn to give back to her by surprising this shocked bride with a VIP day at Kleinfeld. The surprises keep getting bigger and better all day long.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Am a Bride on a Budget
programme.desc: Lauren has a $2,000 budget but is in love with a dress that will blow that budget to shreds. Shoshana is a struggling actress, paying for her own dress to complete her special day. Sara is way over budget and has to convince her father it's worth it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bling, Lace and Cleavage!
programme.desc: Krystle loves attention, but her friends may not agree on her over-the-top sexy dress. Maria wants a pure white princess or mermaid gown, but shocks her pastor father with a sexy sheer bodice. Jaclyn faces a major dress dilemma.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm a Legacy
programme.desc: Joelle tries on her mother's 1987 Kleinfeld dress, but is not sure if she is ready to walk down the aisle '80s style. Randy and Antonella know it's going to be a rough appointment when bride LeAnne declares she's the ultimate anti-bride!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I've Stalked This Dress on Instagram
programme.desc: Chic designer Hayley Paige is getting married and makes three one-of-a-kind dresses for her big day. Bride Elisabeth comes to Kleinfeld with one goal: to buy her dream Hayley Paige gown. LaKesha, a superfan of designer Lazaro, gets a shock at the salon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Afraid to Try New Things
programme.desc: Wedding planner Rachel is excited to try on dresses so edgy they might scare off other brides. Plus, Natalie also wants a unique gown, but she's worried about getting her traditional mom's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Come on in, Grandma!
programme.desc: Amanda's biggest challenge is finding a dress both she and her opinionated grandmother love. Hillary searches for a specific gown her late grandmother adored. Macie already found her dream dress, but now Grandma wants to see her in something different.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That Looks Like a Torture Device
programme.desc: Bridget's feelings about the perfect dress for her wedding to pro snowboarder Scott Lago get turned upside-down by her opinionated entourage. Meanwhile, new mom Karyssa wants a dress with lots of coverage and Lauren hopes she fits into her gown.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Stuck in a Toilet

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Couch Creature
programme.desc: A woman believes her neighbours want to kill her; a man is near death after an arrow pierces his chest; two women with swollen abdomens refuse to explain the cause of their pain.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Punched!
programme.desc: An injured ER doctor puts on a show to stop a patient's violent outbursts; a man's heart fails as his daughter and girlfriend fight; on Christmas Eve, the family of a patient with severe burns prays for a miracle.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Shredded!
programme.desc: A man is rushed to the ER, apparently clawed by a tiger, but he won't reveal the true cause of his injuries. A patient says he's been shot in the head, but the bullet is nowhere to be found. A doctor believes that a woman who is brain dead can be saved.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Zombie Uprising
programme.desc: A Halloween zombie with a problem below the belt mystifies doctors. Later, a doctor makes mistake that amazingly explains a patient's condition.

programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Paranoia
programme.desc: Rosa enlists Jake to help change Terry's disapproving opinion about her fast-moving relationship with Adrian Pimento. But their love for each other is put on hold when Pimento thinks someone from his past is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Maximum Security
programme.desc: In an attempt to get information on a criminal operation, Amy has to go undercover at a women's prison and befriend one of the prisoners. Meanwhile back at the precinct, Holt and the team plan a fake funeral in an attempt to catch a hitman.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Bureau
programme.desc: With Pimento's life still in peril, Captain Holt calls on an old friend in the FBI to help with a seemingly impossible heist. Meanwhile, Amy makes a breakthrough while undercover, and Terry and Gina discover an information leak in the Nine-Nine.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Halloween IV
programme.desc: It's Halloween in the Nine-Nine which can only mean one thing: heist time. This year, the squad members pull out all the stops in their quest to win the new defending title of 'Ultimate Detective Slash Genius.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Champions Special
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer gets crazy eyes, Noah Gardenswartz knows what not to say during brain surgery, and Clayton English is convinced that a major pop star is watching him.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Show Some Respect
programme.desc: Dave Hill confesses who he has on the brain, J.P. McDale tales a shot at Dave's career, and Ali Kolbert reveals her side hustle.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: White Tasty
programme.desc: Tone Bell schools a lucky person on the street, Jade Catta-Preta goes hard at Tone's love life, and Noah Gardenswartz spots someone very special in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Demo Crazy
programme.desc: Sara Schaefer knows what not to say in a search party, Joel Kim Booster explains why your grandpa doesn't trust him, and Yassir Lester knows all about Joel's longest relationship.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Laugh Riot
programme.desc: Learn how to play the most epic game of mattress dominos ever, and see why staircase sledding never gets old.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Fools on Parade
programme.desc: See why flying a kite isn't a breeze, marvel at a grown man getting a billy goat back massage, and watch a construction worker stain himself pink.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: World Wide Whackos
programme.desc: Find out how a little eye makeup can help you pull off a prank that's both hilarious and scary. Plus, watch things go downhill in a hurry when people try to back that thang up.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Pranks and Funny Fails
programme.desc: Find out what happens when you get caught in a no-selfie zone, why mailing humans is the way of the future, and how cuddling is an art form of its own.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performer 11
programme.desc: A rapper whose balance is worse than his rhymes, a flaming embarrassment of a TV chef, a dancer who lost her sexy a long time ago and a weather man with serious arachnophobia.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 12
programme.desc: Butter-fingered figure-skaters, busted-ass break dancers, klutzy beauty pageant contestants and comedians who are only funny because they're so not funny.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 13
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the dumbest performers you've ever seen including a woman dancing in butter and team mascots gone wild.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 14
programme.desc: Featuring a countdown of some of the dumbest acts on stage. Performers from a lion tamer to a woman with a special talent, each one is special in their own way.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Lizard Law
programme.desc: Never before seen footage; a severed camera cable; the magic team messing with Michael during a trick.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Serious Deja Vu
programme.desc: The trick that Michael initially thought was too goofy. The trick that took nearly a week of rehearsals and tested Michael's memory.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Out of Control
programme.desc: Find out how Michael makes himself sound like an expert, what he loves collecting and how the magic team surprised the rest of the crew.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Framing Canon
programme.desc: Find out which magic team member knows how to ride a unicycle, what trick almost used an alpaca and which trick nearly resulted in Michael slicing open his neck.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Football
programme.desc: Adam hits the gridiron to show why the playoffs rarely determine which team is best, and he explores how sports drink hydration myths are putting kids at risk.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Animals
programme.desc: Adam explores how purbred dogs are genetic monsters created by bored Victorians, and reveals how domestic cats are overpopulated lethal killing machines.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Wild West
programme.desc: Adam illustrates how, despite its macho man reputation, prostitutes actually helped settle the West. He then goes on to explain why the 'All-American Cowboy' is a myth, and that the real hero of the west wasn't a person at all - it was air conditioning.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Going Green
programme.desc: Adam meets a young dad who is on a personal mission to save the world and end climate change. We learn why the famous 'Crying Indian' PSA wasn't quite what we thought.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Hospital
programme.desc: Inflated hospital costs have created an unfair system, reckless antibiotic prescriptions makes them worthless, and you might not need a mammogram.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Dating
programme.desc: Adam swipes right on knowledge by exposing the flaws in dating sites. Plus, alpha males, and wolves, don't exist, and personality tests are a failure.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Amvox 73
programme.desc: Find out what location was right next to an airport and a golf course, which animals kept getting loose on set and what other animal was camera shy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Take the Mirror
programme.desc: Find out what happened when a scorpion got loose during magic rehearsal, what money truck sent the crew scrambling and what fruity trick had a British influence.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Warthogs, WogHearts, and Hogwarts
programme.desc: Find out what happens when Michael tricks an off-duty cop with a fake bill, which prop kept malfunctioning and which one was used in an unaired sitcom pilot.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Drone Care
programme.desc: Find out what trick was almost cancelled due to rain; which insect attacked the magic team during rehearsal; and what is Michael's shirt size.

programme.desc: The story behind this hit sitcom has more drama than a daytime soap opera; adolescence, legal troubles, millions of dollars per episode, and cast members with immense power.

programme.desc: How the Bronx-born Fly-Girl turned herself into an A-list actress and pop diva.

programme.desc: Hollywood stars have always searched for higher meaning outside of fame. But when self-help groups like NXIVM prey on the Hollywood elite, their cult-like tactics leave a wake of destruction.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company

programme.title: Movie: It's Complicated
programme.desc: While attending their son's graduation in New York, a divorced couple rediscovers their feelings for each other. They later return to their homes believing that their affair is over, but soon find themselves continuing the relationship.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pubs and Grub
programme.desc: Guy hits up a classic British pub in St. Louis, serving up gourmet Grilled Cheese, and a brewing station in Kill Devil Hills N.C. making righteous shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unexpected Eats
programme.desc: Guy is in search of the most unique offerings of everyday favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Traditional Gone Wild
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into some dishes like mama made, if she had a wild imagination.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pound Cake to Pot Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's pullin' in for a mishmash of comfort food. In Philadelphia, the low country joint dishing out unique North African chicken and sour cream pound cake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cross-Country Classics
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's roadtrippin' all over the country for some home-style cooking. In Boston, the funky neighbourhood joint cranking out Southern staples, like chicken and waffles and off-the-hook tots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh Fish and Funky Chicken
programme.desc: Guy is hitting the road for some outrageous seafood and tasty chicken. In Des Moines, Iowa, the trophy-winning barbecue joint is dishing out unique wings and an apple dumpling dessert.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Griddles n' Vittles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed west for barbecue and beyond. In Los Angeles, a food court gem grills up homemade chorizo and a Yucatan turkey special. Then, in Las Vegas, Nevada, two funky joints fire up the grill.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Seafood and Shawarma
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's taking an eclectic, global-infused tour of Flavortown. In Minneapolis, an Italian spot carries on a fun, family pizza-making tradition, and in Miami, a champion chef cooks Haitian classics like griot, snapper and octopus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bagels, Biscuit and Boar
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into all kinds of flavour, starting in Santa Fe, N.M., at a pub serving comfort grub like chicken and biscuits and in-the-shell clam chowder. A spot in Reno, Nev., on its game with dishes like a double elk chop and wild boar spaetzle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Wings 'n' Things
programme.desc: Ain't no thing but a chicken wing in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, when Guy Fieri stops by to taste a couple of new eats they've added. A Nashville barbecue spot has a new take on the old standard wings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eating Up New Orleans
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a tasty tour of New Orleans, Louisiana. He rolls into a legit butcher shop with a funky take on the Big Easy's comfort food flavors.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Chili Three Ways
programme.desc: Guy Fieri crosses the border to Vancouver, British Columbia, to check in on an authentic Chinese place and see if their thousand chili chicken is as spicy as it sounds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Succulent Sandwiches
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into succulent sandwiches! In Oakland, a real-deal butchery stacking up killer cheesesteak and off-the-chain chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Greats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going global with international flavours. In Miami, a funky Haitian joint cooks up island favourites like griot and fresh red snapper. In Los Angeles, a 70-year-old Italian spot serves up their legendary spins on pizza and lasagna.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: The Savory Side Of Brunch

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like A Pro: Seafood
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing all her seafood secrets and pro tips, starting with her recipe for Cioppino, a satisfying one-pot stew with cod, shrimp, scallops and mussels.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Fearless Food
programme.desc: Ina Garten is tackling daunting dishes with easy techniques, from a perfectly risen souffle a l'orange to overcoming pastry fears with her totally professional-looking Anna's tomato tart.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Super-Sized Sunday
programme.desc: Giada invites friends over to watch the big game and makes gourmet super-sized versions of some of our favorite game foods, including a three-way tie sandwich, a bar made up of game day dips and chips, and spicy Calabrian shrimp.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha Goes to Boot Camp
programme.desc: Trisha and her friend, Natalie, suit up for boot camp. Afterwards, they whip up a menu low on calories but high on flavor, including kale chips, lemon orzo chicken soup, chickpea salad sandwiches and an angel food cake with grapefruit compote.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Mexican Fiesta
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites her friends to a fun afternoon Mexican fiesta. She puts her spin on Mexican classics with recipes that include avocado salad, red and green charred salsa, cheater churros and steak fajitas.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Pizza Ree-A
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's sharing recipes from her pizza place in town. For takeout with a difference, she makes foolproof pizza dough, garlic butter and a no-cook pizza sauce and uses them for her triple pepperoni pizza and her signature pie, pizza Ree-a.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Care Package 101
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares the fundamentals of creating care packages while putting one together for Alex. Lemon raspberry pound cake, snickerdoodles, brown butter granola clusters, strawberry fruit roll-ups and custom-made hot chocolate mix gets wrapped up.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fall Fan Favorites
programme.desc: The chefs share new twists on viewers' fall favourites with dishes like Sunny Anderson's mini meatloaves cheat sheet and Geoffrey Zakarian's pumpkin, bacon and caramelized onion quiche.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: A Fair to Remember

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Burger Bash
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges his talented chef friends to take a burger beyond the basic patty and bun. Antonia Lofaso combines sirloin and brisket with braised oxtail for an intensely meaty burger and whips orange juice for a crisp Garibaldi cocktail.

programme.desc: Beloved Asian small-clawed otter Pinkie has a recurring bloody nose, and the team goes to great lengths to find out what could be causing it. Feisty baby American alligators arrive at the aquarium and must learn to eat in an orderly way.

programme.desc: Robert takes on the challenging task of relocating Bosco, the most aggressive croc at the zoo. Bindi must investigate Forest the giraffe's bad knee problem. Terri helps Harley the koala find love at the end of a difficult breeding season.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Tough Love
programme.desc: Blue Poison dart frog Bertha loves to wrestle. The zoo would like to breed her, but she's scared off all potential suitors. The keeps introduce some new young male frogs, in hope that one of them will be strong enough.

programme.title: The Zoo: Grumpy Cats' New Digs
programme.desc: Iray, a red ruffed lemur, is rushed to the health center when keepers discover a wound on his leg. A new exhibit is built for the Pallas's cats, the original grumpy cats. Plus, seven adorable baby turtles join the zoo's colony of an endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: Mending Willow
programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.desc: Concerned about flooding in Assumption Parish, Tia seeks a solution for how she and the dogs would be able to evacuate quickly. After he rescues an injured dog off the streets, Joe feels a special bond and takes him under his wing.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Our Growing Pack
programme.desc: A California man hopes to find a new dog to stay by his side as be battles cancer. After Lizzy rescues a sick dog, she rushes to the vet, hoping it's not too late. Tania and Perry prepare to embark on a new chapter in life by entering parenthood.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Under Earl's Wing
programme.desc: A family from Chicago comes to VRC, hoping to find their first dog. Out in Assumption Parish, Tia takes in a dog that has been attacked and is near death. Earl bonds with a young Villalobos employee and tries to mentor him on how to stay out of trouble.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Southern Dogs in the City
programme.desc: Villalobos is invited to participate in Dog Bowl, creating a chance for a handful of dogs to steal the spotlight. M2 helps a neglected dog left in horrible conditions. And a couple takes the first step towards becoming parents - adopting a Villalobos dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Box of Puppies
programme.desc: A potential adopter wants to give a forever home to a senior dog that has only known life in a kennel. M2 and Kanani are shocked when they find a box of puppies in a field. And, Matt and Earl head to the kitchen to cook up some fresh food for a sick dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Fire Dog
programme.desc: A potential best friend needs to pass a unique test before he can be adopted out. Parolee Jammall returns after a mysterious absence. A year after losing their house in a fire, M2 and Kanani do something special for the dog who saved their lives.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Raised in Rescue
programme.desc: Return adopters visit Villalobos to find a dog that will feel at home on their boat. Tania and Mariah head out to rescue a stray that is hiding beneath a shipping container. And parolee Jammall starts to slip up, risking his future at the rescue.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World
programme.desc: A baby klipspringer is born on one of the coldest nights of the season and is miraculously nursed back to health. The California condor team at the Safari Park goes to unbelievable lengths to save this highly endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise

programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend in town. But Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, Reverend Lovejoy, when Homer starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Whiskey Business
programme.desc: Grampa injures himself while babysitting Bart, and quickly discovers he prefers being cared for by his grandson than the staff at the nursing home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fabulous Faker Boy
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side, and his initial resistance quickly subsides when Marge hires Slava’s beautiful daughter, Zhenya, as his new piano instructor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Saga of Carl Carlson
programme.desc: When Homer and his friends win $200,000 in the Springfield lottery, Carl takes off to Iceland with all the winnings.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dangers on a Train
programme.desc: On a trip to 'Dizzneeland,' the Simpons board the wrong ride and are transported to Kang and Kodos' home planet.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerland
programme.desc: In a nod to the hit cable series 'Homeland,' Lisa suspects Homer may have been 'turned' when he returns a changed man from a nuclear power plant operating convention. So she enlists the services of the FBI.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Four Regrettings and a Funeral
programme.desc: Four Springfielders are prompted to try to right past regrets following the funeral of a beloved neighbour.

programme.title: The Simpsons: YOLO
programme.desc: Marge encourages Homer to embrace his 'You Only Live Once' spirit by inviting an old pen pal to stay with him and cross items off of his 'to-do' list from when he was a 10-year-old. Meanwhile, Lisa institutes a new honour code at Springfield Elementary.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Labor Pains
programme.desc: Homer remembers his Lamaze skills when he's forced to deliver a baby in an elevator. When the mother names the child Homer Jr., he quickly develops a deep emotional bond with the kid. Lisa is recruited by the cheerleaders of the local pro football team.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Kid Is All Right
programme.desc: Lisa finally makes a new best friend, Isabel Gutierrez, only to discover that she's a Republican and her opponent in the campaign for second grade class representative.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Yellow Subterfuge
programme.desc: Principal Skinner promises the students that the best-behaved among them can take a ride in a submarine. When Skinner gives all the kids a clean slate, Bart believes even his own past indiscretions will be forgotten.

programme.title: Family Guy: Don't Be a Dickens at Christmas
programme.desc: A selfish Peter loses his Christmas spirit and is visited by ghosts of Christmas past, present and future who take him on a journey around Quahog in the style of Charles Dickens' 'A Christmas Carol.'

programme.title: Archer: Archer Dreamland: Sleepers Wake
programme.desc: Dutch becomes a new man while Archer’s ransom exchange goes up in smoke.

programme.title: Hippo vs. Croc
programme.desc: Two of Africa's deadliest species tough it out against everything nature throws at them.

programme.title: Cougar vs. Wolf
programme.desc: Big cat wrangler Boone Smith tracks recent wolf and cougar skirmishes as he delves into why these two big predators carry on the cats vs. dogs rivalry.

programme.title: Shark vs Predator
programme.desc: Sharks are rulers of the aquatic world, molded by evolution into a fierce predator. Few dare to challenge the king of the ocean, but we investigate what kinds of animals would be daring enough to take on these killing machines.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Bear Trapped
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley is perched in the trees waiting for a hungry bear and a reindeer needs help.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Bovine Intervention
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley treats two disgruntled pigs and a calf banding turns into a wild cow chase.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: License to Quill
programme.desc: Harper the dog needs Dr. Oakley's expertise when a chance encounter leads to a prickly situation with severe consequences.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Livestock Mutilation and Curse of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost Train of Doom
programme.desc: Experts investigate mysterious and strange events caught every day on cameras around the world, and explain how these bizarre things are possible.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings to discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Hunt for Flight MH370
programme.desc: Since 2014, the fate of Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 has remained a mystery. It's still unclear if it crashed, and if it did, the wreckage has yet to be found.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Angie/ Paul

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Mennonite Mob
programme.desc: When a Mennonite family man is stopped for drunk-driving, no one could predict that it would expose a shocking underbelly of organized crime. Abraham Wiebe risks it all as a central figure in one of the largest criminal cases in Oklahoma history.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Find Jodi
programme.desc: More than two decades after an Iowa TV anchor disappeared, '48 Hours' reveals new information into the investigation.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Original Amish Murderer
programme.desc: When Katie Gingerich is found murdered and disemboweled, even the most hardened police are shocked.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Mennonite Mob
programme.desc: When a Mennonite family man is stopped for drunk-driving, no one could predict that it would expose a shocking underbelly of organized crime. Abraham Wiebe risks it all as a central figure in one of the largest criminal cases in Oklahoma history.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Find Jodi
programme.desc: More than two decades after an Iowa TV anchor disappeared, '48 Hours' reveals new information into the investigation.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: A God-Fearing Woman
programme.desc: Naomi Huyard never strayed far from home, so her sudden vanishing rocks her tight-knit community to its core. When detectives make an unspeakable discovery, they soon realize there's much more to the story than meets the eye.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Fire for Freedom
programme.desc: Identical twins Caleb and Joshua are the apples of their father's eye, but the pressure to be exceptional manifests into dangerous hatred. Isolated from the world, their seclusion fuels a need to break free at any cost.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Candymen
programme.desc: The George Brothers grew up privileged, but had no respect for authority. In Florida's pill-mill epidemic of the late 2000s, the Georges rose to millionaire status, only to crash amidst a chaos of overdoses, arrests and a tragic train accident.

programme.title: Dateline: Vengeance
programme.desc: A woman accuses her boyfriend of raping her and then finds herself on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dateline: Finding Savanna
programme.desc: A mother disappears with her 11-month-old daughter after losing a hotly contested custody battle. The father’s epic search for his child spans four continents and nearly two decades, with heartbreaking twists and an emotional conclusion.

programme.title: Dateline: Death in the Driveway
programme.desc: In a quiet Southern town, police find a prominent lawyer brutally murdered and his girlfriend bound in duct tape. Investigators pursue a long list of leads, until they zero in on a surprising suspect.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Patricia Mills is killed in a house fire in Goliad, Texas. Her sister, suspicious the fire is deliberate, investigates. It takes 10 years to break the silence but the surprising culprit is finally trapped: the fire was arson, Patricia was murdered.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Silver Peak's Secret
programme.desc: Charlie Kinkel goes missing in a remote Nevada mining town. His wife Trayce investigates but is shunned by locals. When a body is discovered, detectives break down the silence to reveal Charlie's murder was a tragic case of misplaced suspicion.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Buried Deep
programme.desc: 23-year-old Sherry Leighty disappears from Altoona, PA, leaving her three small children behind. After a 13 year search her sister discovers the rumor she skipped town with a new boyfriend is a lie and people close to Sherry have been hiding a secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don't add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt for a secret eyewitness they've heard could crack the case wide open.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Victim Zero
programme.desc: A massive brawl erupts at a local bar ends with the shooting death of a young army soldier. To unravel the murder, Lt. Joe Kenda must infiltrate a revered military institution, and expose a dangerous vendetta.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation. But when Kenda takes a closer look at the victim's love life, he realizes someone's been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the 'victim' could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun. The key to the case lies in the deal they were discussing.

programme.title: Homicide City: Bingham Street Blues
programme.desc: Northeast Philadelphia's Crescentville neighborhood is known for tranquility seldom seen in major cities. But when a mother, her boyfriend, and daughter are found slain at home, the community searches for answers.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got No Fingerprints
programme.desc: Jerry Bowen fled before sentencing of the murder of Brenda Breckenridge. Bowen erased his fingerprints with acid and befriended homeless men to assume their identities. After 7 yrs, detectives were able to find enough remaining prints to declare a match.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Watch Those Country Girls
programme.desc: Ex-con Roger Delucenay is locked up in county jail. When his brother is sent there a few months later, the two carry out a daring escape. They run to Kentucky to lay low but when a jealous ex rats them out, the two are forced to run again to stay free.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Crawl My Way to Freedom
programme.desc: After a botched robbery, Darryl Norris faces murder charges and a long prison sentence. He pulls off a brilliant escape through the ceiling of his cell and plans to flee the country. But authorities are determined to find him and lock him up for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Home to Mother
programme.desc: After getting handed a stiff sentence for robbery, Robert Nielsen flees the brutality of prison by escaping and living under the radar with his family in California. But even they can't shield the young fugitive from the challenges of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Crawl My Way to Freedom
programme.desc: After a botched robbery, Darryl Norris faces murder charges and a long prison sentence. He pulls off a brilliant escape through the ceiling of his cell and plans to flee the country. But authorities are determined to find him and lock him up for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Home to Mother
programme.desc: After getting handed a stiff sentence for robbery, Robert Nielsen flees the brutality of prison by escaping and living under the radar with his family in California. But even they can't shield the young fugitive from the challenges of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Watch Those Country Girls
programme.desc: Ex-con Roger Delucenay is locked up in county jail. When his brother is sent there a few months later, the two carry out a daring escape. They run to Kentucky to lay low but when a jealous ex rats them out, the two are forced to run again to stay free.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Emergency Supply Run
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, the team comes dangerously close to catastrophe as they install a 1,000 pound ridge beam. At Mark Sam's build, the team runs out of critical supplies.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Roof Overhead
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, rain has put everything on hold and the crew struggles to keep things dry. At Mark Sam's build on Chichagof Island, tensions run high on Rich's last day making the team uneasy.

programme.title: Building Alaska: End Game
programme.desc: At Point MacKenzie, Dave Poppert fights the cold and snow to finish his home in time for Thanksgiving dinner. Bruce Chambers lucks out when a friend comes to help put the finishing touches his Latouche Island cabin.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Traditional Residence
programme.desc: The Snow sisters battle a tough auction to win a three-bed, one-bath home. At another auction, Randy wins a small garage-like structure, but has to give up on his plan to turn it into a guesthouse after he injures his leg.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Wraparound Ranch Home
programme.desc: The Hayhurst Brothers score a problematic three-bedroom, two-bathroom home at auction. The house lacks a master suite and the chimney must be demolished before the structure can be relocated.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Hayhurst Brothers' Contemporary Crib
programme.desc: The Hayhurst Brothers work on increasing the size of a small house to one with four bedrooms and two baths. They dedicate the front of the home to the common areas, adding custom shelving units and a kitchen island, and build living quarters in the back.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: From Trash to Treasure
programme.desc: Casey and Catrina score a small house at auction and discover loads of trash inside. After cleaning up the mess, they're able to reconfigure the three-bed, two-bath home into a spacious and functional cottage. They also discover an old shed in the back.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Wraparound Ranch Home
programme.desc: The Hayhurst Brothers score a problematic three-bedroom, two-bathroom home at auction. The house lacks a master suite and the chimney must be demolished before the structure can be relocated.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Dead Lawn Diagnosis
programme.desc: In-home expenses have caused a couple to neglect their home's exterior. The crumbling driveway and clashing materials are also driving clients away from their home-based business.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Baltimore Fireboat
programme.desc: After a call from their old friend, Captain Tim, the crew travels to Norfolk, Virginia, to salvage a fireboat from Baltimore. When they return to the shop, Mike and Tay enlist the help of a local coppersmith to fashion unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Barnesville House
programme.desc: The dawgs tackle Ohio's cold and snowy winter to salvage an old Italiante house that's beaming with character. Back in the shop, things heat up as Tay comes up with a plan to use old pulleys as the legs for a unique table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Blacksburg Barn
programme.desc: The dawgs head to Blacksburg, Virginia, to salvage an 1800s barn with an internal log structure. It should be an easy job, but a hurricane on the horizon means a tighter deadline to make it out before the storm arrives.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bluefield House
programme.desc: The crew deliver a large lamppost that will serve as the focal point of a new community space. Before taking on this project, the team visits the Bluefield House in West Virginia to find classic commodities needed to restock the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Boulevard at Capital Centre
programme.desc: The crew get a huge opportunity in suburban Washington, D.C. where they work on the former site of the Capital Centre. The arena was demolished in 2002, but is just now being redeveloped. Later, Tay builds a breakfast table out of a car engine.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Dayton Mill Power Plant
programme.desc: The team organizes a dawg vs. dawg build competition after Mike and Robert get a tip on an abandoned power plant from an old client in South Carolina. The winner of the contest is a tough call as both teams' pieces are rooted in the original aesthetic.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Revival
programme.desc: Brett restores a classic Spanish Colonial Revival that hasn't been touched in years because the owner is a professional musician who is always on the road. He must make the kitchen and bath functional while staying true to the home's character.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Mansion
programme.desc: Brett thinks he finally gets an easy restoration job on a stunning Spanish Colonial hillside mansion until he finds out it has a pink Victorian kitchen. Then he uncovers hidden treasure on the old woodwork but the homeowners don't share his excitement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Building Hope
programme.desc: Ingrid was in the process of converting a small cottage into a modern home when she suffered an aneurysm and two strokes. Her daughter took over, but needs Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Ain't Seen Nothing Yet
programme.desc: After hiring her neighbour to renovate her kitchen, Lali has nothing but a demo to show for the $11,000 she paid him.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Hidden Halloween Horrors
programme.desc: The competition begins with a deliciously difficult pre-heat as the eight Halloween bakers weave spider web desserts with creatures trapped inside.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Fall Forward Desserts
programme.desc: In the Silence of the Yams pre-heat challenge, bakers make yam desserts that evoke classic scary movie cliches from chainsaws and hockey masks to bloody knives and creepy dolls.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Monster Mania
programme.desc: A monster has ransacked the kitchen and is on the loose! The bakers work together in the pre-heat challenge to create a 3-D suspect sketch out of pate a choux to help track him down.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Hallowedding
programme.desc: It's bridal season for Halloween lovers and since bridal showers often have petit fours, the bakers are creating "petit horrors" in the pre-heat challenge. In the main heat, it's time for a Halloween wedding!

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Circus of Dread
programme.desc: A group of talented bakers enter the fortune-telling tent at the circus of dread in the pre-heat challenge. The competitors are tasked with creating tarot card desserts featuring blood orange, fig or passion fruit.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Cranium Epicurean
programme.desc: Inspired by a mysterious 'skull man,' the bakers enter the graveyard to bring skull desserts to life in the pre-heat.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes: Snake Charmer Showdown
programme.desc: Nothing is ever normal in the sideshow tent, so Vivian Chan and Zac Young challenge the three teams of bakers to imagine a dangerous snake charming gone wrong.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes: Creepy Clowns
programme.desc: They're meant to be the most fun-loving entertainment at the big top, but three teams of bakers create clown cakes that will haunt the dreams of kids and adults alike.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Crunchy
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro explores snacks that know how to put that little crunch in your munch, like See's Candies peanut brittle and Snak King's crispy Taco Litos.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Colorful Candies
programme.desc: From delightfully twisted Red Vines to the multicolored Mike and Ikes and multi-flavored Jelly Bellies, join us for a Willy Wonka style tour of treats.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet Sensations
programme.desc: Algonso gets a sweet sensation from treats like the iconic Sugar Daddy, colorful Warheads Chewy Cubes, and the luscious Milk Chocolate with Caramel Squares from Ghirardelli.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Flavor Infusion
programme.desc: Alfonso has the inside information on what makes some treats so tasty, from the iconic Andes Mints to Christie's chocolate cookies. Then, see how snacks like Taffy Town's cotton candy taffy and Ole Smoky Tennessee Moonshine pack so much serious flavors.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Let It Roll
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro finds there just about anything can be rolled in La Chiquita's Tomato and Basil Tortilla. He also discovers how Stuckey's Pecan Log Roll evolved from a sweet treat sold from the trunk of a car, into a roadside classic.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Freaky Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso highlights snacks with some freaky flavors! From Upton's Naturals Bacon Seitan to the Smoked Nib Brittle from Olive and Sinclair, to Trolli Sour Brite Crawlers, these curious treats are good eats.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Food Trucks
programme.desc: From fish tacos and porchetta sandwiches to shrimp po' boys and turtle sundaes, Roger Mooking is featuring the 12 best dishes from American food trucks.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Soul Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking joins chefs in their own kitchens as they honour the traditions of comforting and flavorful soul food dishes. From ribs, catfish and barbecue to oxtail, pork chops and cornbread.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Hot Chicken, Spicy Beef and Ice Cream Sundaes
programme.desc: Brad Miller begins his culinary adventure in Nashville at Red's 615 Kitchen food truck, where Chef Eric White is known for his take on the local favorite, hot chicken.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Stuffed Arepas, Mac 'n' Cheese and Doughnuts
programme.desc: Brad Miller gets a taste of Venezuelan street food at Arepas House food truck in Denver, Colo., where Chef Jorge Dominguez serves a traditional corncake sandwich filled with marinated flank steak, grilled pork sausage and creamy avocado sauce.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Dip It Good
programme.desc: Cozy up with a bowl of chips because host Michael McKean has the scoop on our favorite dips. He'll discover that guacamole wouldn't be good without a mailman, queso almost started a civil war and chocolate fountains are full of physics.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Vegas, Baby!
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean has a date with Lady Luck and is ready to go all-in on some tempting Vegas eats. He'll find out how prime rib lured us all to Sin City, and why prohibition poured us all a shrimp cocktail.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: War and Peace
programme.desc: Michael McKean gets caught in the middle of some culinary conflicts as he uncovers some very delicious details. He solves the Cuban Missile Crisis with chop suey, runs the redcoats out with cornbread and keeps the peace with a little kimchi.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Play With Your Food
programme.desc: Michael McKean turns our plates into a playground as he finds out the stories behind some famously fun foods! He'll spell out a solution to the Great Depression using alphabet soup and more.

programme.title: Good Eats: Sausage: A Beautiful Grind
programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown demonstrates how easy it is to make homemade sausage.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raising the Steaks
programme.desc: Alton Brown returns to the scene of episode one to re-think the great American steak.

programme.title: Good Eats: Great Balls of Meat
programme.desc: Learn to make better meatballs, use a muffin pan in new ways and to cook Swedish meatballs, a 60's summer classic.

programme.title: Good Eats: Q
programme.desc: Alton Brown thinks he's cracked the barbecue code and makes pulled pork.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Four: 1969-1979
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Five: 1980-1989
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Six: 1990-1999
programme.desc: The 1990s bring change with expansion and the sports' first-ever conference championship game. Florida's Steve Spurrier fashions an era of high-octane offense, and his Gators form a rivalry with Tennessee and quarterback Peyton Manning.

programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.
