programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Yamashita's Gold
programme.desc: Josh heads to the Philippines, searching for gold hidden by Japan in WWII.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the D.B. Cooper Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off on an expedition to crack the mystery behind the perpetrator of the only unsolved plane hijacking in US history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of Brother XII
programme.desc: Josh Gates attempts to uncover a treasure left behind by the Aquarian Foundation, an isolated, insidious cult led by the notorious leader known as Brother XII.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazis in Argentina
programme.desc: Josh ventures to Argentina, where many Nazi SS officers escaped to after World War II.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Hunting Nazi Hideouts
programme.desc: In a search for the mysterious Nazi fortune, Josh Gates investigates an alleged code that was supposedly disguised in a piece of sheet music. Afterwards, Josh goes on a hunt for treasure that once belonged to a notorious Nazi general.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazi Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Josh heads to Europe to expose the last secrets of the Third Reich. The lost fortune of a Nazi war criminal draws Josh to Austria, where he may need to dive deep to find treasure. He also meets a researcher who may have made a historic find.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Woolly Mammoth
programme.desc: Josh searches for woolly mammoth DNA in Canada, Korea, and Siberia, and treks deep in Siberia where mammoth bones are mine out of the permafrost.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Legend of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Josh heads to the jungles of Central America to investigate the legendary crystal skull that was discovered by a renowned adventurer who was the inspiration for Indiana Jones. Josh probes whether the skull is a lost relic or archaeology's tallest tale.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Gold of Scotland
programme.desc: John joins treasure hunters in the Scottish Highlands chasing a lead on a lost cache of gold that was hidden after the Jacobite Uprising of 1745 and never recovered.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle Exposed
programme.desc: Examine what's beneath the surface of the Bermuda Triangle's 440,000 square miles of ocean. The Triangle's freak waves, magnetic anomalies and giant whirlpools have been blamed for mysterious disappearances for decades.

programme.title: Raised Hunting: Connect
programme.desc: When a son's girlfriend takes up bow hunting, she learns that hunting brings no guarantees.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: Ninety thousand tons of ammunition explodes; two cranes fall fifty stories in Taiwan.

programme.title: Finding Escobar's Millions: What's In The Box?
programme.desc: Former DEA agents break open a mysterious concrete box at a secret narco airstrip and dig for millions at a remote safehouse frequented by Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: Keith Lorensen
programme.desc: Keith Lorensen spent many years at sea in the Navy. He was injured during a terrorist attack on the USS Cole in 2000.

programme.title: Progressive Bass Wrap Up Show: Week 07 Tournament Coverage
programme.desc: Tournament bass fishing coverage from across the country.

programme.title: Raised Hunting: Structure
programme.desc: A question from a follower leads David to look at how much and what kind of 'structure' he has in his own life.

programme.title: The Given Right: Jaclyn's Dream Hunt Comes True in Colorado
programme.desc: Kenneth fulfills a promise to take his niece on her dream hunt in Colorado.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Crisis in the Klondike
programme.desc: A crisis in the Klondike forces Parker, Rick and Tony to take massive gambles to strike it rich and hunt for gold on new grounds. The setback hits just as the price of gold spikes, sparking a new gold rush to the area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaska
programme.desc: The Perrins brothers are building an extremely remote log hunting cabin in the heart of the Alaskan Range, in the deep wilderness of Sheep Lake. They have just two weeks to construct an entire single-story cabin.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Spearfish Canyon
programme.desc: Deep in the backwoods of Spearfish Canyon, South Dakota's premier off-grid builder Jared Capp sets out to turn four shipping containers into a stunning two-storey mountain hideaway.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliffside retreat for a family wanting to reconnect in the Sierra Nevada Mountains. But for Gregg and his team, building in the middle of nowhere presents its challenges.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaskan Glacier
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee is building a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier where no man has stepped before. But in an area plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather, this fearless bushman needs to time his construction perfectly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Roaring Back To Life
programme.desc: As the winter ice thaws, Idaho's River of No Return flows, and the people living on its violent shores navigate the raging spring rapids. The small community hustles to work, so they can survive another season in this rugged and dangerous backcountry.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Bit By a Boa
programme.desc: A boa constrictor has wrapped around a man's arm and won't let go; a young woman has a severe laceration but doctors begin to suspect there may be more to her case than the injury, a young man goes into anaphylactic shock after a dinner out.

programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.desc: BG and Lee have filled their million-dollar Victorian home with hoards of stuff. Chris has filled his house and eight storage units with worthless junk that he gets for free.

programme.desc: Shannon is convinced that her hoarding is caused by demons possessing her home and is so frightened by the entities and severe clutter that she and her children live in a shelter. Ray's home almost burned down the block when his hoard caught fire.

programme.title: Hoarders: Vula/ Lisa
programme.desc: Vula hoards more than 30 sickly cats that have completely destroyed her home. Lisa, a teacher, has already lost one job by bringing her hoard from home to the classroom.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened

programme.title: Movie: Delivery Man

programme.desc: After Jake injures himself on a case, Terry forces him take time off and rest, something Jake doesn't know how to do. Across town, Holt and Rosa try to avoid intimate conversation during a double-date with their significant others.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cuban Assimilatory Persea Plant
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Italian Food Matter
programme.desc: Michael uncovers ancient secrets at an Asian gift shop, reveals a transformative spray at Eataly and leaves his assistant speechless at a photo shoot.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Industrial Asphalt Sealant
programme.desc: Michael trains his coworkers how to hold a dog who can't hold it. A man can vanish into a manhole, and maybe even a manhole can vanish itself.

programme.desc: Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix a tablet, makes a drink that's impossible to swallow and turns a dog into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.desc: After two men are shot, detectives follow the clues that lead them to a serial robber they've been tracking. After a third shooting results in death, the detectives work quickly to find this robber turned serial killer.

programme.desc: The shocking murders of attorney Vince Sherry and his politically active wife Margaret.

programme.title: City Confidential: Carthage: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: The residents of a Texas town are stunned when a well-liked citizen is accused of murder.

programme.title: Monstresses: Katie Belflower & Brandita Taliano
programme.desc: 2003, Livermore, California: 17-year old Katie Bellflower seduces a high school classmate's husband, 20-year old Mike Simons. The young Monstress is willing to kill not just once--but twice--to keep Simons to herself.

programme.title: Monstresses: Diana Haun & Morgan Hughes
programme.desc: In 1996, Ventura, California, 32 year old supermarket clerk Diana Haun thinks she has met her soul mate in co-worker Michael Dally when the two start a steamy affair. Diane decides to do whatever it takes to get rid of Michael's wife, Sherri.

programme.title: Monstresses: Elizabeth Reynolds & Linda Henning
programme.desc: In 2003 Kingsville, Texas, Elizabeth Reynolds claims she's divorced when she gets involved with 39-year-old Al Benitez. But when he finds out she's still married, he tries to break it off. She goes berserk and hires a man to get her revenge on Al.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: These Are the Streets
programme.desc: Stolen jeep followed; individuals are captured and a gun is recovered.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's Job Security
programme.desc: Task force patrols the streets at night incognito to track down unsuspecting thieves.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's the Brick Bandit!
programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: Homicide City: Danger Comes Home
programme.desc: When 78-year-old, George Volz's family finds him hogtied and decomposing in his Philly row house, police turn to the neighborhood for help.

programme.title: Homicide City: Main Line Massacre
programme.desc: When Philadelphia Mainliners Courtlandt and Alexandra Gross are found murdered in their home, detectives begin the hunt for a calculated killer which takes them from one of the wealthiest zip codes in the country straight into the heart of Philly.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Come With Me
programme.desc: After a failed relationship, 22-year-old Jennifer Hitchcock thinks she may have finally found that special someone when she meets Maurice Mason. But as soon as Maurice moves in, she can't help but feel as though someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Black Widow
programme.desc: Gary Taylor knows what people say about Catherine Mehaffey. Still, when he finally meets the sexy lawyer, he just can't stay away. But it's only a matter of time before Gary realizes he's made a grave mistake and breaking things off won't come easy.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Searching for Sherri
programme.desc: A young mother vanishes while out jogging. A frantic search is mounted. Then, just as suddenly, three weeks later she reappears, battered and bruised and her long blond hair chopped off.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Screaming Oaks
programme.desc: An army vet goes out of his way to make his neighbors feel welcome, but when a child's birthday gift goes missing; it only takes 37 days for the friendships to end in a killing spree.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What Happened to Abby?
programme.desc: A teen vanishes on her way home from school. Weeks later a puzzling letter from her arrives in the mail. This is the story of a desperate search for a girl hidden in plain sight, and her tale of bravery and resilience in the face of terror.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Searching for Sherri

programme.desc: Gary Taylor knows what people say about Catherine Mehaffey. Still, when he finally meets the sexy lawyer, he just can't stay away. But it's only a matter of time before Gary realizes he's made a grave mistake and breaking things off won't come easy.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Driven to Extremes
programme.desc: The investigation into a Texas-sized case of love looks into infidelity, road rage and possibly murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Usual Suspect
programme.desc: Investigate the murder of a Memphis business woman with a story that includes love, betrayal, fast cars, murder and a secret double life.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic?: Part 1: Missing
programme.desc: In October 1989, 10 year-old-Amy Mihaljevic is lured to a suburban Ohio shopping mall by an unknown man and is never seen again. A 30 year mystery and nationwide manhunt ensues, thousands of leads, hundreds of suspects, one killer still at large.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic?: Part 2: The Hunt
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains at large. A cavalcade of suspects emerges, each more compelling than the last. Investigators explore each one. Then, 106 days after Amy was taken, a gruesome discovery some 50 miles away from her Bay Village home: a body.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic?: Part 3: New Evidence
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains on the loose and the case goes nationwide. Margaret appears on Oprah, anniversaries come and go, and then, finally, a confession. A man stands up in church in a neighboring town and declares: 'I killed Amy Mihaljevic.'

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Second Shot
programme.desc: When Dianne Hood is gunned down outside a community center in Prison Valley, no one can understand why anyone would want to murder the well-liked housewife. The answer involves betrayal, greed and obsession, in an infamous love-triangle murder plot.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Killer Confession
programme.desc: When Lea Porter goes missing in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery - the killer's true identity. As the killer evades arrest, Lea's brother devises a plan to make him confess.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Jehovah Jinx
programme.desc: Jehovah's Witness Pam Candelario is murdered during a home invasion and her husband Ralph is brutally beaten. But what appears to be a home invasion soon turns into one of the most bizarre murder cases that police have ever encountered.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: No Giving Up
programme.desc: When Marty finds his big brother Mike Rust's home in disarray with a motorcycle missing, the Saguache, Colorado, community leaves no stone unturned searching for one of their own. The case goes cold as years pass, but the local rumor mill heats up.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Deviant Deeds
programme.desc: A man is hysterical when he finds his brother's girlfriend and roommate beaten with an iron and stabbed to death on the floor. The brothers appear devastated, but the discovery of her missing phone casts doubt on their alibis.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Nothing Random
programme.desc: An elderly couple in Moscow, Idaho, frantically perform CPR on their young neighbor after a pop of gunfire interrupts their bedtime routine. Investigators follow fresh footprints from the scene, only to learn the killer may already be behind bars.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Friends You Keep
programme.desc: Home will never feel safe again after Jill finds her daughter Emma Walker cold to the touch in her own bed. Quickly ruling out suicide, investigators search for a suspicious man in black caught on a neighbor's home surveillance camera.

programme.title: Shattered: The Pact
programme.desc: In 1990, a teenage boy vanishes. Nearly two decades later, there's still no trace of him, dead or alive. It's a mother's worst nightmare, but one detective refuses to stop looking until he's able to solve this mystery.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of longtime Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Alan Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions - and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: The Renegade Mobster
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house recently retrofitted with a substance that’s been banned in Canada for decades.

programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Keep Calm and Karrie On
programme.desc: Two sisters take on a dilapidated house in Seguin, Texas, with moldy walls, a leaky roof and a bad odor. While safety and power tools may not be their strongest attributes, the two work to turn the grimy property into a livable space for potential buyers.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Plagued by Perfectionism
programme.desc: A woman wants to support her husband's dream of flipping a house in Parma, OH, but she quickly realizes his perfectionism will result in a slower flip than anticipated. As each project becomes more complicated, she feels stuck in a never-ending flip.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Overhaul
programme.desc: It's a Cabin Masters conundrum as Chase and the team are challenged to take a former garage and turn it into a home that will comfortably accommodate six siblings and their seventeen kids.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Keep Calm and Karrie On

programme.title: Lawn and Order: From Bland to Bright
programme.desc: Lance and Kristina are ready to sell their house and move into their forever home, but they're competing with a brand-new house being built next door. Their house is bland and completely lacking curb appeal.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Distressed Dining Room
programme.desc: Nicole turns her attention to taking the pink and gold kitsch out of the formal dining room. Restoring the floors, swapping out sconces and repairing the stained glass windows take the room out of the 1970s and back to 1904.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: In at the Deep End
programme.desc: Nicole cleans up the swimming pool and converts some garage space into a much needed changing room area. Tapping into the sewer line causes more mess than she bargained for, while Nicole also finds some time to take some swimming lessons.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Cover Up
programme.desc: Nicole takes on the living room and study, restoring the rooms to their former 1904 glory by polishing up the original woodworking details in the rooms.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brick by Brick Restoration
programme.desc: The Summit mansion hasn't been painted since 1972 and needs a major face lift. After years of damage, all of the outdoor wood railing and detail are rotting and need to be replaced.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brightening the Bedrooms
programme.desc: Nicole tackles the upstairs bedrooms and bathroom which have had their natural beauty covered in old wallpaper and fixtures.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Up and Away
programme.desc: Nicole puts a modern twist on the 1904 Summit Mansion in St. Paul when she installs an elevator in the middle of the home.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Nicole finds her home in Minnesota to be flooded from burst pipes due to the extreme cold. She and her crew try to discover where all they leak are located in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: Nicole teams with basketball superstar LeBron James to renovate a special family's house in his hometown of Akron, Ohio. They gut the dingy, dilapidated kitchen and create an outdoor patio and new driveway for playing basketball.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Nicole's doing a surprise home renovation for one of her carpenters, Bobby, and his family. Bobby and Karen started renovating their house two years ago, but their daughter was diagnosed with cancer and they turned their focus to her.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Surprise for Tessa
programme.desc: Tessa and her family are coming home soon, and Nicole needs to finish their surprise home renovation before they do. She tackles the laundry room and hallway in the back addition of Bobby and Karen's house.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Hard Work Beats Talent
programme.desc: Reality sets in for first-time extreme cabin builder Nick Blanco in Alaska as he fights the tides trying to retrieve pylons for his foundation. Brannon's team gets stuck on the muddy trail bringing in more build materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Noah's Barge
programme.desc: Jere, Ben and Tim put the finishing touches on the biggest project they've undertaken: building a 112-foot floating barge. They struggle with transporting it to the water, and hurricane-force winds change their plans.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Stuck in Shelikof
programme.desc: Nick experiences firsthand just how dangerous living in Alaska can be while hunting for driftwood to build his fishing lodge and warehouse. Jere and Ben's 112-foot barge starts its half-mile journey to the water.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away
programme.desc: Rain and a muddy trail continue to slow down Brannon's cabin build, but despite their dampened spirits, the gang is able to haul the windows across the two-mile trail. Jere and Ben finally get the barge launched.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Loin
programme.desc: Beef tenderloin is one of the most luxurious cuts of critter known to man, expensive too. Alton investigates where this costly cut comes from, how to buy it and what to do to get your money's worth out of it.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Loin 2
programme.desc: Alton completes his strategy of getting your money's worth from the luxurious cut of meat known as beef tenderloin. We learn the legends and preparations of Carpaccio, Philly Cheese steak and the perfect Chateaubriand.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Meats
programme.desc: Find out why the burger at Minetta Tavern is the most talked about burger in town.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Americana
programme.desc: Classic American fare gets the royal treatment at these extraordinary spots. Heavy-Metal inspired burgers piled high with the works and mouth-watering, stick-to-your-ribs barbecue in Brooklyn are featured.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Old School
programme.desc: Yardbird in Miami gives a taste of the true south with its unique fried chicken and fried green tomatoes.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Hotlanta
programme.desc: Heirloom Market BBQ in Atlanta brings together Korean and American barbecue in a quirky roadside eatery.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: San Fran Sweet Treats
programme.desc: We found three San Francisco restaurants that stand out in this foodie paradise. At Craftsman & Wolves, chef William Werner's attention to detail creates edible works of art like the Caramel Cube Cake that is actually spray-painted.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Reinvention
programme.desc: In New York City a charming little shop in putting a gourmet spin on a crisp rice treat, with flavours loved by children and adults alike.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Awesome Asheville Sweets
programme.desc: At the speakeasy Nightbell, they take traditional Southern dishes, add a little culinary magic, and turn them into bite-sized morsels that will surprise and satisfy. The Hop creates some of the most unique and delicious ice cream flavors imaginable.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Ice Cream Nation
programme.desc: At Morgentern's Finest Ice Cream in New York, inventive flavors and unusual toppings take center stage.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jerusalem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern investigates the rich culinary heritage of Jerusalem. From savory classics like shawarma, falafel, kubbeh and hummus to tempting pastries like halva and bureka, this holy city's edible icons are steeped in history.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Lisbon's iconic seafood, pork sandwiches, and custard tarts.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: An Epic Cake Challenge
programme.desc: Husband-and-wife team Phil and Christine shape an innovative wedding cake while Rosie faces an epic cake scaling two-feet high. Later, Molly ages her cake perfectly for a cheese maker's surprise party and Suzanne stuns a crowd with a dream wedding cake.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cakes in Wonderland
programme.desc: Molly Robbins likes to push the boundaries. She's been asked to create a five-tier cake themed around Alice in Wonderland, complete with an edible Cheshire cat and a pouring teapot.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes: Snake Charmer Showdown
programme.desc: Nothing is ever normal in the sideshow tent, so Vivian Chan and Zac Young challenge the three teams of bakers to imagine a dangerous snake charming gone wrong.

programme.title: Freakshow Cakes: Creepy Clowns
programme.desc: They're meant to be the most fun-loving entertainment at the big top, but three teams of bakers create clown cakes that will haunt the dreams of kids and adults alike.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Blue Man Group
programme.desc: Former baker's assistants will be returning to take their place in the spotlight as they battle it out for the chance to have their cupcakes featured at a VIP Las Vegas party for the world renowned Blue Man Group.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Ultimate Showdown: Cirque Du Soleil Cupcakes
programme.desc: Four of the best Cupcake Wars bakers of all time face off in a one-of-a-kind baking adventure to have their cupcakes at the center of an epic party celebrating Cirque du Soleil.

programme.desc: Spongebob is going to have the best day ever, until all of his friends have problems; It's Best Friends Day, so Spongebob and Patrick trade Best Friend presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chum Bucket Supreme/ Single Cell Anniversary
programme.desc: Plankton hires Patrick to create advertising slogans for the Chum Bucket. SpongeBob helps Plankton find the perfect anniversary gift for Karen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shellback Shenanigans/ Hide and Then What Happens?
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick play hide n' seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Albrittina/ Simon for President
programme.desc: When Alvin catches Simon taking a test to discover his soul mate, he decides to do the same and prove just how silly the test really is. Simon and Alvin decide to rebel and launch their own campaigns for class president.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Independence Day/ Opposites Attract
programme.desc: When the boys get tired of taking orders from Dave, they decide to build a treehouse in the backyard and move out. When an invention of Simon's accidently gets knocked over it magnetizes Alvin and Simon making them inseparable.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Members Only/ The New Kid
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves. Alvin befriends a lonely new kid in school, but Theodore discovers the new student may not be who he says he is.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Smart Lair/Hot Soup: The Game
programme.desc: Donnie's new invention takes over the Lair. Then, Mikey goes on a mission to retrieve a Lou Jitsu video game.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Evil League of Mutants
programme.desc: Baron Draxum assembles of league of villains against the Turtles.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mystic Library/ The Purple Game
programme.desc: The Turtles plumb the depths of a mysterious hidden library in search of a way to rescue Mayhem. A competitive new video game has swept New York and Donnie will do anything to reach rank number one.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Pteranodon't!
programme.desc: When a child becomes stranded in the Pteranodon aviary Own must make a daring rescue.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: The Power and the Peril!
programme.desc: Ian Malcolm returns to the island to help with strange power surges throughout the park.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Flushed but Never Forgotten/ Lair Games
programme.desc: The Turtles have a secret that comes back to haunt them. April presents her award winning documentary about the Turtles annual event: The Lair Olympics.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Safety Third/ Mister Manners
programme.desc: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him a replica of the car. Alvin must pass a manners course before he gets his dream meeting with the Princess of England.

programme.title: RBUK
programme.desc: A kitty with magical powers goes on adventures with her best friends.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Lights, Camera, Adam/ A Case of Diary-Uh
programme.desc: Timmy lands the role of Cleft, the Boy Chin Wonder; Timmy uses Vickie's diary for revenge.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad Meet Crimson Chin
programme.desc: When Timmy accidentally releases the crimson chin's arch-villain, all heck breaks loose.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Movie: WALL-E
programme.desc: In the distant future, a small waste-collecting robot embarks on a space journey that will decide the fate of all mankind.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: World's Best Mom
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Clash of the Cranky Chefs
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout
programme.desc: After crashing Ma Beagle’s birthday party, Webby and a new mysterious friend must get back home.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Monster of Phineas-n-Ferbenstein/ Oil on Candace
programme.desc: Boys set off to Central America to help a Damsel in Distress Isabella.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Druselsteinoween/ Face Your Fear
programme.desc: When Doof inherits a castle in Druselstein, Vanessa moves her Halloween party to the new digs; when Vanessa asks him to babysit her pet bat, Doof has to overcome his lifelong fear of bats.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Karmi and Hiro team up to help treat someone with genetically engineered parasites.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 must continue to fight off a city overrun with monsters.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: The Rise of Dock Ock: Part One
Big Hero 6: The Series: Mr. Sparkles Loses His Sparkle
programme.desc: Mr. Sparkles, a deranged game show host, threatens Mochi, forcing Go Go to get over her fear of looking stupid in public to beat his crazy obstacles.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Into the Unknown
programme.desc: After being launched into space by Kaz and crew, the Colossus encounters engineering problems, which are made worse by a mysterious stowaway.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doofapus/ Norm Unleashed
programme.desc: Candace liquefies herself with one of the boys' inventions. Then Phineas and Ferb invent nanobots that can assemble themselves into any object imaginable.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra
programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Master of the Wind! Air Knight!
programme.desc: Achilles finally entered the Turbo Awakened state against Hyde and Hades, but can Aiger repeat his success? If he wants to stand a chance against the Master of Wind, Kit Lopez, he’ll have to deepen his bond with Achilles.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven Ares: The Clash of Three
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Living on the Cutting Edge!
programme.desc: Objects are being cut into pieces all over Melemele Island, and the Ultra Guardians set out to investigate!

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: Into the Unknown
programme.desc: After being launched into space by Kaz and crew, the Colossus encounters engineering problems, which are made worse by a mysterious stowaway.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Legend of Pumpkin Guts
programme.desc: Mavis is determined to break out of lockdown on Halloween.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Brain Drain/ Hair Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: Aunt Lydia snags Pandora's Box from Mavis and asks Zombie Isaac Newton to figure out how to open it. Unfortunately, a brain swap between him and Hank creates bigger problems. When Medusa comes to Hotel Transylvania, Aunt Lydia's hair acts up.

programme.title: Movie: WALL-E

programme.title: Movie: Hotel Transylvania

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching

programme.desc: Brenda's parents are in town trying to pin down her wedding date. When a murder investigation interrupts the visit, she drags Cliff and Willie Ray along.

programme.title: The Closer: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: An overweight owner of a jewelry store turns up dead in the trunk of a car.

programme.title: The Closer: Power of Attorney
programme.desc: What seems like a slam dunk case of rape and murder is fraught with peril. An aggressive DA and Brenda square off and the results will be a first for the squad.

programme.title: The Closer: Fate Line
programme.desc: Brenda races against time on a multiple homicide case after finding clues on a cell phone.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: A consultant is hired by a workaholic mother in an effort to get her through the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Kiss
programme.desc: An interior designer and her assistant compete for the affections of a socialite home for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in the City
programme.desc: After closing down her small-town family business a woman and her child move to the big city where an old friend offers her a job in the toy department of Wolmans. The woman realizes she must bring out the true meaning of Christmas before it’s too late.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Ride to the Rescue
programme.desc: A Sacramento law student is convicted after a brutal home invasion and murder. Her cause seems lost until Joyce Ride, mother of Sally Ride, becomes intrigued with the case.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murdered Babysitter
programme.desc: A babysitter is found brutally murdered in Santa Ana, California, with five young children left in the home unscathed. The parents are quick to point to a local transient who had previously burglarized the house.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Rough Justice in the Big Easy
programme.desc: A businessman is shot dead during a mugging in New Orleans. Cops pursue a criminal named John Thompson and secure his conviction on the charges. Two successful lawyers agree to represent him and soon discover prosecutors weren't playing by the rules.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Love Kills
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Stacey Stites' body is found half-naked by the side of the road, her fiancé, police officer Jimmy Fennell, is cleared as a suspect.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Mississippi Mother
programme.desc: Sabrina Butler, a 17-year old woman, arrives at a Mississippi hospital with her baby dead on arrival. Nurses and doctors suspect foul play, and Sabrina cannot give straight answers about what happened to her baby.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.desc: Otto and August radio Eivin for rescue after facing an emergency at sea. Atz Senior must decide between life on the Yuletide and returning to the family homestead. Atz Lee puts Jane's homesteading skills to the test with a wilderness scavenger hunt.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Rusted and Busted
programme.desc: Otto surveys the condition of his rusting barge after a winter in drydock, while Eivin and Eve use explosives to clear land for a new root cellar. And later, Jane builds an innovative dogsled for Atz Lee.

programme.desc: A predatory bear stalks a homestead forcing the rancher to aggressively protect himself and his cattle. A jetboat engine failure in the river rapids puts Buck's operation in jeopardy. A violent storm forces bush pilots to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: Why We Hate: Origins

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Outhouses, Cow Bras and Bears, Oh My!
programme.desc: The Kilchers scramble to make the most of 22 hours of sunlight. Atz tracks down predators killing the herd. Otto gets creative to help a cow with an udder problem. Eivin builds an outhouse. Atz Lee and Jane are startled while fishing for salmon.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Broken Promises

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Ripped Apart

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Rolling the Dice

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Baby, Come Back

programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.desc: Holly discovers that Carrie used her for her van; Doug argues with a feisty waitress.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ice Cubed
programme.desc: Guilt gets the better of Carrie when she seeks refuge from a blizzard in a church.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Catching Hell
programme.desc: While at a Mets game, Doug spills mayonnaise on one of Carrie's most important clients.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: Carrie is upset with Doug when she learns that a free TV was the reason for their getaway.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buy Curious
programme.desc: When their neighbour dies, Carrie decides it's time for them to enter the real estate game.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Vocal Discord
programme.desc: In an effort to save money, Doug and Carrie ask their neighbour Glenn for counselling since he happens to be a marriage counsellor. Glenn agrees to help out only to have his problem-solving techniques backfire, causing their arguments to get worse.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Consummate Professional
programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug lied to her about getting a job at IPS ten years ago.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Like Hell
programme.desc: When Doug is conspicuously not invited to Jared's barbecue, Doug and Carrie begin to feel insecure about their less-than-popular social standings at work. They both decide to overcompensate in an effort to rectify the situation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bouncy, Bouncy, Bouncy, Lyndsey
programme.desc: Walden discovers how challenging it is to be intimate with women with his foster son, Louis, in the house. Also, Herb asks Alan if he can go on a date with Lyndsey.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Here I Come, Pants!
programme.desc: Alan takes it upon himself to help Walden keep Louis after the social worker discovers he and Walden are not really a gay couple.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: For Whom the Booty Calls
programme.desc: Walden joins a group for adoptive fathers and finds it to be a nice escape from Alan.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable
programme.desc: When Ed and Betty, the owners of a bed and breakfast where Doug and Carrie are staying for a romantic weekend, become too overbearing for them, Carrie forces Doug to tell them they are going to stay at the new Hyatt Hotel across town.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Move Doubt
programme.desc: When the couple next door decides to sell their home, the Heffernans try to persuade Deacon and Kelly to buy it. Doug and Carrie realize something is wrong when the two are completely disinterested in the home. Danny and Spence try to impress a girl.

programme.title: The King of Queens: G'Night Stalker
programme.desc: When Doug starts receiving fan mail from someone who saw his performance at a karaoke club, he lets the attention go to his head, only to have his ego shattered when the emails suddenly stop.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Major League'd

programme.desc: Erica, Barry and Adam are not happy when their distant relative Gleb visits from Russia, until they realize he can make their lives so much easier. Meanwhile, Beverly starts working on her cookbook, which causes tension with the Frentas.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Beverly Goldberg Cookbook
programme.desc: Beverly and Adam team up to do a mother-son cooking show on public access television; and when Barry ruins the one college letter of recommendation he is able to get, Murray must step in to help.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: 8-Bit Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled when he has to design his own video game for school, so he turns to his family for inspiration. Meanwhile, Beverly is worried about Pops’ gambling and ropes Bill Lewis into her latest scheme.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: This Is This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: The Dropouts are thrilled when they book a gig at a Flyers charity carnival, and Adam uses the opportunity to make his very first rockumentary. Since Barry doesn't want to miss out on the fun, he forces his way into the band.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Seeing Stars and Stripes
programme.desc: It's summertime in Texas. Game Wardens handle a speeding jet ski, drunk boaters, angry campers, and a rowdy raccoon.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back Road Bait
programme.desc: It's snapper season on the Gulf, and as fishermen catch fish, game wardens catch fishermen who are breaking the law. Two men are investigated for cruelty to a wild pig, a jet ski collision leads to arguments, and an exotic tortoise finds a new home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Small Town Troubles
programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas. Wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property. A fisherman is illegally catching oysters. A game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow wildlife adventurer and biologist Forrest Galante as explores the real stories behind animals thought to be gone forever and tries to prove their existence so he can protect them and help them thrive again.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Submerged
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens are all hands on deck after a massive flash flood. Game Wardens rush to a gas station that could explode. A patrol through the Rio Grande leads to an unexpected encounter. Game Wardens investigate an illegally killed hawk.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens are all hands on deck after a massive flash flood. Game Wardens rush to a gas station that could explode. A patrol through the Rio Grande leads to an unexpected encounter. Game Wardens investigate an illegally killed hawk.

programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Last Primates of Madagascar
programme.desc: For some 100 million years the flora and fauna of Madagascar have evolved utterly independent of the rest of the world. Steve travels to this unique biosphere to leap with lemurs, a rare, ancient species of primate.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kitten Dolls
programme.desc: Three litters of kittens grow from helpless furballs to rambunctious young kittens in this epic story.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Fifi's Ruining My Love Life
programme.desc: Sean cozies up to pet scorpions, snakes, tarantulas and fiancé Lindsey at home but can't deal with Avery, the rambunctious sphynx cat. From the moment Leslie moved into her boyfriend David's home, his cat has made it clear she's not welcome.

programme.title: The Vet Life: The Dog Ate My Shorts
programme.desc: Dr. Blue must figure out what's wrong with Niko, a lethargic dog that may have eaten his mom's shorts. Dr. Lavigne operates on a husky with a torn ligament and Dr. Ross faces an emergency with his own family pet. The vets treat Cy-Fair to a crawfish boil.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: The Cutest Yak in Colorado
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a couple's cherished bloodhound puppy that won't eat. Dr. Petra races to save a cat after he's swallowed a handful of hair ties. And Dr. Jeff and Hector head out to a veteran's ranch to help a baby therapy yak.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Gaur Move
programme.desc: Keepers introduce three gaur, a large, skittish species of cattle, to the rest of the herd. A sickly Sambar fawn is rushed to the health center. Plus, the bird department excitedly prepares for the arrival of great hornbills.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Adventures of Porcupine Dating
programme.desc: Rhino Kifaru is attempting to mate, despite his arthritic knees; tapir Jenny falls ill, and widowed porcupine Roxy meets a new mate.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Village of Wolves
programme.desc: Villalobos is tested like never before when Tia and her crew are called upon to rescue a pack of wolf-dog hybrids abandoned by a backyard breeder. With law enforcement threatening to kill the dogs, the pressure is higher than ever.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Tia races to rescue an emaciated puppy chained to an abandoned home. A couple visits VRC in hope of finding a younger sibling for their dog. And a Good Samaritan needs help rescuing a stray mama dog still bleeding three weeks after giving birth.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Everything Is Hungry
programme.desc: Winter is here and the time for preparation is over. Bob deals with the ramifications of crashing his plane. To begin trapping, Heimo must find a way to cross a newly frozen river. Ray and his daughters set out to catch much needed meat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Last Sunset
programme.desc: The cost of life hundreds of miles from civilization is front and center. Tyler and Ashley trek 15 miles to a lake cabin to run their dog team and search for food. Bob leaves home to see his daughter and assess the damage of his crashed plane.

programme.title: Movie: South Central
programme.desc: A veteran gang member is determined to spare his son from the ravages of gang life.

programme.title: Movie: Boyz 'N the Hood
programme.desc: A coming-of-age film about Tre, a bright teenager who is sent to live with his father when his mother feels he needs a male role model. Tre's father guides him to choose the smartest path when he becomes torn between gang life and attending college.

programme.title: Martin: Green Card
programme.desc: Pam agrees to marry the building superintendent when he's threatened with deportation, but her help comes at a price.

programme.title: Martin: You're All I Need
programme.desc: When Martin flirts with a producer's wife, Gina becomes jealous and fights back.

programme.title: Martin: Kicked to the Curb
programme.desc: Martin and Gina end up homeless when their old apartment is sublet and the deal on the new one falls through . Desperate to recover their old place, they try to scare away the new tenants.

programme.title: Martin: The Best of Martin
programme.desc: Tisha Campbell hosts this clip show of the best of the last 99 episodes. Included are many of the special moments from the show, outtakes, and Tisha's own insight into the laughter behind the series.

programme.title: Martin: The Love Jones Connection
programme.desc: Sheneneh appears as a contestant on a dating game show and gets a lot more than a date.

programme.title: Martin: Where the Party At?
programme.desc: Martin gets a big surprise on his birthday - no one wants to come to his party.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Friends, Colleagues, Brothers
programme.desc: Tired of being overlooked for promotions, Joan decides to publicly express her feelings.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Declaration of Lynndependence
programme.desc: Joan and Toni tell Lynn they want her to start living in the real world and get a job.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Diss-regard
programme.desc: Joan's friends complain that she spends too much time with Sean and not enough with them.

programme.title: Girlfriends: A Kiss Before Lying
programme.desc: After finding out that they'd kissed once, Sean demands that Joan stop seeing Davis.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Burning...Monologues
programme.desc: Joan wonders why Sean has not yet said that he loves her; Toni catches a venereal disease.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Loose Lips Sink Relationships
programme.desc: Joan tells Toni's boyfriend that Toni has accepted a marriage proposal from another man.

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Fallout
programme.desc: Joan struggles with Toni's betrayal and is advised to cut Toni completely out of her life.

programme.title: A Different World: Sometimes You Get the Bear
programme.desc: Denise is apprehensive about a visit from her grandfather, as she fears she cannot live up to his expectations. Jaleesa and Maggie ask Denise to take part in a traditional homecoming prank by stealing the head of the rival mascot's bear costume.

programme.title: A Different World: Romancing Mr. Stone
programme.desc: Many of the girls become smitten with Byron Walcott, their handsome new geology professor. Meanwhile, Maggie concludes that Americas require too much personal space and cuts down her 'body buffer zone.'

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Wedding Show (Psyche)
programme.desc: Unable to deal with the bickering at home, Will and Lisa travel to Las Vegas to elope.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Slum Like It...Not!
programme.desc: Philip goes along with one of Will's investment ideas, which ends up being disastrous.

programme.title: Martin: I've Got a Secret
programme.desc: Pam, Tommy and Cole are angry at Martin and Gina when Martin reveals Pam's secret on his show. Martin and Gina's only friends left are Martin's boss Stan and Stan's girlfriend.

programme.title: Martin: The Great Payne Robbery
programme.desc: When Martin's neighbor is robbed, Martin holds a neighborhood crime watch meeting.

programme.title: Martin: Baby It's Cole'd Here
programme.desc: Cole's mother interrupts his evening with his girlfriend and demands back rent from him.

programme.title: Martin: Radio Days
programme.desc: Stan decides to hire a new female co-host for Martin's show to boost the ratings. At first Martin feels threatened by the move, and is very stand-offish.

programme.title: Martin: Blackboard Jungle Fever
programme.desc: When Martin returns to his elementary school for Career Day, he discovers his favourite third grade teacher, Ms. Trinidad, is still teaching there. As they catch up, she makes a pass at Martin while Gina watches.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Hustle
programme.desc: Brown and Colonel are ripped off by some gangsters, so they decide to get even with them.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Whodunit
